violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No employee was present during time of inspection trained as a food safety manager. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine is to be cleaned and sanitized before establishment is to resume use New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The lid on the ice machine is not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied and turned off during time of inspection. Ice Machine contents were voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine is to be cleaned and sanitized. Establishment is to provide DOH with pictures of cleaned and sanitized ice machine before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the of the food storage shelving for the grab and go hot food in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. NFCS of storage shelving must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024

The floor in the back area by the ice machine is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to repair the flooring in the back ice machine area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
